**Subject:** Inquiry Regarding Medical Record Copies – [Father's Full Name]

Dear Records Management Department,

I am writing to you on behalf of my father, **[Father's Full Name]**, currently [Optional: residing/passed away etc. depending on situation - usually just name], to inquire about how to obtain copies of his medical records.

Specifically, I am interested in retrieving documentation held by your facility dating back to **2002**. Please advise on the necessary steps, required forms, and any associated fees to facilitate this request.

Thank you for your assistance in helping us navigate this process. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Relationship to Patient, e.g., Son/Daughter/Spare]
[Phone Number]
[Email Address]<|im_end|>
